title: hypoporum verticillatum
intro: Hypoporum verticillatum, also known as Whorled Hypoporum, is a type of lichen that belongs to the family Collemataceae. The medicinal properties of Hypoporum verticillatum have been studied for their potential in treating various health issues, including skin conditions and inflammation. The health benefits of this lichen include its antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin from infections. Hypoporum verticillatum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
